qa_pair.question: A four-person household has a 15,000,000 VND budget, wants an energy-saving bottom-freezer refrigerator, and has at most 70 cm of installation width. Request the ranked shortlist and return only the first SKU.
Search currently priced Mini refrigerators suitable for one or two people, inspect the cheapest result, and return only its SKU.
Compare Hisense SKUs 1751097000182 and 1751097000181. One is a top-freezer model and the other is Side by Side. Return only the SKU with the lower current price.
Page through every currently priced refrigerator suitable for four people and costing no more than 15,000,000 VND. Which SKU has the largest usable capacity? Return only the SKU.
Search currently priced refrigerators for a three-person household that have an energy-saving technology. Return only the SKU of the least expensive result.

Search currently priced Side by Side refrigerators for more than five people with the phrase "external water dispenser". Retain only results whose external_water_dispenser field is true, compare their prices, and return only the cheapest SKU.
Use the guidance search to find the entry explaining whether SalePilot knows a refrigerator's stock availability. Return only that FAQ identifier.
Inspect SKU 1751097000182 and subtract its sale price from its original price. Return only the discount in VND as an integer without separators.

For the four-person, 15,000,000 VND, energy-saving bottom-freezer shortlist constrained to 70 cm width, compare all three recommendations. Which SKU has the largest absolute discount from original to sale price? Return only the SKU.
Compare the total count of all category-code-38 refrigerator rows with the total count when priced_only is true. How many source rows lack a current price? Return only the integer.
